_comment: Dev + sales install/distribution profile — everything EXCEPT the personal life-decision pack (commands/life + the 9 life-council skills). This is the 'work machine' profile: full presales/GTM toolkit alongside the dev workflow, with no personal-finance/health/home content bleeding into a work install. Design skills stay in (used by both sales output and dev docs). Consumed by both install.sh --profile work (local filter, ignores rename fields) and cc-mirror.sh --profile work (public distribution, if ever published).
pluginDescription: Dev + sales toolkit — developer workflow plus presales methodology, minus the personal life-decision pack
marketplaceDescription: Curated Command Center plugin for work machines (dev + sales, no personal content)
